data.title: Dragon
data.title_japanese: DRAGON
data.synopsis:
A fast food restaurant manager sexually harasses a young girl who works there. He looks like an ugly monster. Enraged, the girl grows super-sized and crushes him.

(Source: Keita Kurosaka, translated)

titles.title: Toumei Otoko to Ningen Onna: Sonouchi Fuufu ni Naru Futari
透明男と人間女～そのうち夫婦になるふたり～
The Invisible Man and His Soon-to-Be Wife

data.title: Toumei Otoko to Ningen Onna: Sonouchi Fuufu ni Naru Futari
data.title_english: The Invisible Man and His Soon-to-Be Wife
data.title_japanese: 透明男と人間女～そのうち夫婦になるふたり～
data.synopsis:
Yakou, a gentle human woman, works at a detective agency. Tounome is a smart and gentle invisible man. The invisible man's ability is perfect for detective work. However, the blind Yakou can still figure out where Tounome is, even if he disappears. Before they know it, the two become attracted to each other...?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

data.title: Lazy Cat
data.title_japanese: lazy cat
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Lazy Cat by Eve.

data.title: Uchuujin MuuMuu
data.title_japanese: 宇宙人ムームー
data.synopsis:
A cat-like alien from a distant galaxy, MuuMuu, arrives on Earth. His goal is to learn about home appliance technology on Earth to recover the technology his species has lost. The protagonist, Sakurako, has a typical university life, but everything changes with MuuMuu's arrival! What begins as an unexpected cohabitation quickly turns into a whirlwind of chaotic events. The chemistry between Sakurako and MuuMuu leads to a super-spectacular, appliance-filled, and cat comedy adventure. 

(Source: Pony Canyon)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Doremifa Shima no Christmas
それいけ! アンパンマン ドレミファ島のクリスマス

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Doremifa Shima no Christmas
data.title_japanese: それいけ! アンパンマン ドレミファ島のクリスマス
data.synopsis:
After receiving an invitation from Princess Doremi to the Christmas concert on Doremifa Island, Anpanman and his friends immediately set off for Doremifa Island. They decide to sing Christmas songs together by ringing the beautiful bell fruits that Princess Doremi has collected. However, Baikinman appears there dressed as Santa. Baikinman releases sticky buns from his crackers, which soil Doremifa Island, the musical instrument buns, and Anpanman and his friends. Will Christmas be without songs like this? Go for it, Anpanman!

(Source: Amazon, translated)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Kagayake! Burikid no Christmas Tree
それいけ! アンパンマン かがやけ! ブリキッドのクリスマスツリー

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Kagayake! Burikid no Christmas Tree
data.title_japanese: それいけ! アンパンマン かがやけ! ブリキッドのクリスマスツリー
data.synopsis:
Burikid is heading to Christmas Valley with a tin tree in his spaceship to help Santa. When the tin tree lights up, Santa and Rudolph can deliver presents to children without getting lost. However, on the way, they encounter a snowstorm, and the tree and Burikid are thrown out of the spaceship in their container. Anpanman and his friends find Burikid's spaceship, where no one is on board, and they split up to search for Burikid. Meanwhile, Baikinman, who mistakes Burikid for a tin toy, appears in his Baikin Buri Robot to ruin Christmas Eve...

Will Anpanman and his friends be able to deliver the tin tree to Santa and distribute presents to children...?

(Source: Amazon, translated)

titles.title: キミとアイドルプリキュア♪

data.title: Kimi to Idol Precure♪
data.title_japanese: キミとアイドルプリキュア♪
data.synopsis:
Uta Sakura is a lively and energetic middle school student who loves singing.
One day, while walking her dog, she encounters a cute, peach-like fairy named Purirun, who is searching for the Legendary Protectors "Idol Precure." Purirun's hometown, KirakiLand, was a peaceful, sparkly place but has been forced into darkness by the villainous Darkine, leader of the Chokkiri Gang. Uta decides to help Purirun search for cheerful and happy people to become the Precure so KirakiLand can become bright again.
Suddenly, the Chokkiri gang arrive in Hanamichi Town, Uta's hometown, and steal the sparkles from the townspeople. Uta decides to illuminate the darkness with sparkles from her song and is granted the power to transform into the Legendary Protector, Cure Idol.

titles.title: Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku
LUPIN THE IIIRD THE MOVIE 不死身の血族
Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: The Immortal Bloodline

data.title: Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku
data.title_english: Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: The Immortal Bloodline
data.title_japanese: LUPIN THE IIIRD THE MOVIE 不死身の血族
data.synopsis:
Lupin III and his friends head for the Bermuda Sea, aiming for a "mysterious island" that does not exist on the world map. The goal is to uncover the identity of the mastermind who has been sending assassins to the island and to uncover the vast treasure that is hidden there. However, just as they approach the island, their plane is shot down by snipers, and the group crash-lands on an island of death.

What they find there is an end-of-the-world landscape of piles of decaying weapons and nuclear missiles, and "garbage men" who were once used as weapons but have been discarded, roaming the streets. The island is shrouded in fog, filled with a poison that can kill within 24 hours, and there is no escape.

The ruler of the island, Muom, is determined to rule the world by selection and elimination under the banner of immortality. Faced with a "deathless enemy" who cannot be killed with a gun or a sword, Lupin puts his past, and his pride as a thief on the line in a battle of wits.

Will Lupin be able to steal everything within 24 hours and escape the island alive?

(Source: Lupin Wiki)

titles.title: My Organs Lying on the Ground

data.title: Watashi no Yokotawaru Naizou
data.title_english: My Organs Lying on the Ground
data.title_japanese: 私の横たわる内臓
data.synopsis:
Based on the Japanese folk belief of Womb Diving (Tainai Kuguri) or the "unknown hollow spiritual world". In Japanese, the word for womb, "tainai", not only refers to the female organ of the uterus, but also refers to the animistic spiritual hollow space inside a Buddhist statue. This is a space of connection, between life and afterlife, death and life. There, the boundaries between organism and matter dissolve, and outer and inner worlds are continually inverted. 

(Source: Official Site)
